topics.title: Guest Appearances and Contract Negotiations
topics.summary: The studio reviews a previous guest's interaction regarding gender identity and transitions into a mock contract negotiation with Riley Martin over show frequency and compensation.

topics.title: Radio Show Contract Negotiations and American Idol
topics.summary: The studio records a discussion regarding contract negotiations for radio hosts, the upcoming American Idol results, and various celebrity endorsements for contestant Sanjaya.

topics.title: Guest Host Preparation and Listener Feedback
topics.summary: The studio discusses the preparation of a guest host for The View, listener feedback regarding recent guests, and an update on Sal's physical injuries.

topics.title: John Edwards' Campaign and Family Situation
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential impact of John Edwards' wife's cancer diagnosis on his presidential campaign and their family life.

topics.title: Trivia Game and Political Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a debate over the personal lives of political figures followed by a trivia game where participants bet on whether a guest can answer basic questions about history, math, and technology.

topics.title: License Plate Shielding Technology
topics.summary: The studio explores the legality and functionality of a spray-on coating designed to obscure license plates from automated traffic enforcement cameras.

topics.title: Nicole Sheridan Interview
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with adult film actress Nicole Sheridan regarding her career, personal life, and experiences in the industry.

topics.title: Trivia Contest and Guest Appearance
topics.summary: The studio hosts a trivia competition between a guest and a staff member to determine who wins a date with the guest, followed by a discussion regarding her career and physical fitness.

topics.title: Robin Leech and Reality Television
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Robin Leech regarding his history in reality television, his dating life, and the influence of his show on modern celebrity culture.

topics.title: Celebrity Experiences and Television Production
topics.summary: The studio explores personal anecdotes regarding celebrity interactions with Michael Jackson and Bill Clinton, the business of launching the Food Network, and a volatile production incident involving Vanilla Ice on the set of Surreal Life.

topics.title: Robin Leach and Adult Film Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a segment with Robin Leach discussing his career and internet presence followed by a recorded adult film scene featuring Nicole Sheridan.

topics.title: CBS Radio Leadership Change and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The studio reports on Dan Mason becoming the new President and CEO of CBS Radio while discussing entertainment updates including a new Spanish album from Jennifer Lopez.

topics.title: Anna Nicole Smith Autopsy and News Reports
topics.summary: The studio reviews the autopsy results of Anna Nicole Smith, which attribute her death to a combination of medications and an infection from injected vitamins, while also discussing news stories regarding legal disputes over paternity, John Edwards' political candidacy, and medical reports on twin births.

topics.title: Media News and Entertainment Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the American Idol competition, YouTube's first awards, news regarding 50 Cent and Serena Williams, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
